completedItems: Updated development seed and clear mutations to operate only within the current authenticated/anonymous scoped user session instead of a global shared dev user.
Added server-side development gating for destructive seed/clear utilities: they require a dev Convex deployment or explicit CHAT_DEV_TOOLS_ENABLED=true.
Kept confirmation-string validators on destructive mutations and the Svelte UI dev-only buttons.
Seeded messages continue to span multiple dates and are inserted through validated Convex mutations using bounded indexed cleanup.
unfinishedItems: Manual seed/clear verification against a running Convex dev deployment was not performed.

commandResults.output: Prettier passed and ESLint exited 0; generated Convex files still emit four unused eslint-disable warnings.

issuesDiscovered: Manual dev data tooling requires Convex env support (`CONVEX_DEPLOYMENT` beginning with `dev:` or `CHAT_DEV_TOOLS_ENABLED=true`).

validationAssertionsTouched.notes: clearDevData deletes scoped sessions/messages with bounded indexed reads.
seedDevData creates realistic alternating user/assistant mock data.
Destructive utilities are server-gated to dev deployment/explicit env and retain literal confirmation validators.
Seed data spans four days for date navigation testing.
